_comment: Synthetic PR-context fixture for ADR-0007. Shapes mirror real `gh` JSON outputs but all identifiers, logins, and SHAs are fabricated. No real GitHub data is redistributed (ADR-0004 spirit applied to GitHub payloads).

prView.title: feat(stage1): add deterministic player ID hash

comments.body: Nice cleanup. Could you split commit 2 into doc-only and behavior changes?

inlineComments.body: Hash collision risk if two players share name + birth year — add team to the key?
Consider asserting stable ordering before deep-equal.

reviews.body: LGTM after addressing the inline comment on the fixture builder.
